x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Alert-to-incident conversion is the mechanism by which Now Assist ITOM connects infrastructure events to ITSM workflows. Zero conversion means AI has no historical alert-incident linkage.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure alert management rules to automatically create incidents for actionable alerts meeting severity and duration thresholds. Now Assist ITOM uses alert-to-incident linkage for AI-suggested remediation — zero conversion means this capability has no historical data to learn from.
